1650174352.note: Hongdae/Yeonnam celiac-friendly bakery & cafe. Staff confirmed gluten-free when asked. Highlights: pizza, churros with chocolate dip, salt bread, coffee, gluten-free cakes. Price is slightly higher than non-GF. (User review, 2026-02-10; verify on visit.)

1741203487.note: Gluten-free pizza spot founded by an owner with celiac experience (user-reported). Made to order; expect a wait when busy. Recommended: four-mushroom pizza. Cool interior, nostalgic pop music, located on B1. (User review, 2026-02-10; verify on visit.)
